sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55482" key="katafa/neia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταφάν-εια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰν], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n55482.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clearness</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κ. καὶ γαλήνη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.914f</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n55482.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">manifestness</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κ. ποιεῖν ἐν τοῖς λόγοις</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">715f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
